ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., option, future, stock) */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, index, commodity) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the financial instrument */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issuing entity of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Market sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instrument was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_underlying_asset FOREIGN KEY ("underlying_asset") REFERENCES underlying_assets ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "strike" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price of the financial instrument */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the financial instrument */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the financial instrument */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price since previous day */,
  "change_pct" REAL /* Percentage change in price since previous day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the financial instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the financial instrument */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the market data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the trading day */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underlying_assets" (
  "underlying_asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underlying asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the underlying asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of underlying asset (e.g., stock, index, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Primary exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the asset's origin */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Market sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry within the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underlying_asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, trade) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
